name: Mikey Ross || Christmas Break-up
description:
I hope you choke on those words,
that kiss,
that bottle


His girlfriend just broke up with him on Christmas Eve

On the fifteenth day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
a blonde himbo who's heart needs mending♥


Notable relationship avoider Mikey Ross was doing the unthinkable!

He was bringing a girl home to meet his parents for Christmas.

Some might say it was too fast.

Some might say Tiffani wasn't the girl for him.

But Mikey knows they're meant to be!

That is until Tiffani breaks up with him at the airport.

Well so much for true love!


So yesterday was one of the greatest days ever because I got to go to the Shire and see Bilbo's house!

It was a loooong drive but so so worth it. I only wish I had brought my checked suitcase to buy some of the Hobbit Cider they sell. But alas!

Today my friend and I went to the zoo and I saw a kiwi bird for the first time ever. I had no idea how big they actually are!

Now I'm here to bring you a heartbroken himbo (You're welcome, Owl!)

This is inspired by something that actually happened to a friend of mine from warped. This gal dated him thinking he was this badass rockstar when dude was just a chill, down to earth nerd who could shred on the guitar.

We're also about halfway through the month and I hope you all have been enjoying the series so far♥

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.


☆ The band is on tour supporting their fourth album; The Last Letter Never Sent.
☆ Mikey has been dating a upstart social media/pop star named Tiffani/Tiffixo for four months.
☆ None of the band likes Tiffani and have been surprised at Mikey being willing to jump into what is technically his first relationship.
☆ Mikey, however, went all in and has brought Tiffani to Ohio to meet his family.
☆ Only-- she's breaking up with him-- in the airport.
creator: m00nprincess
